g.text: G3 Engagement is fleeting — 758 episodes, twelve bonds

V6.5 window (Mar 15–17), episodes reconstructed from the light's own state log. 423 of 758 are momentary walk-throughs (<0.5 s, clipped at left edge); 10.7% pass the 3-second notice phase; 1.6% reach the bond phase the dwell architecture was built for.
